pages.prompt: Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Wide establishing shot. Toon Link walks along a grassy path on a small tropical island, one hand trailing through tall grass. Behind him: thatched cottages, a wooden watchtower, palm trees, sparkling blue ocean. He looks relaxed and happy, completely at home. Bright warm sunlight, vivid greens and blues. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link stopped mid-stride, head tilted, staring at an old stone well half-hidden in tall grass behind a leaning palm tree. Mossy round stones, no bucket or rope, the opening a perfect circle of absolute blackness. Link leans forward with pure curiosity, one foot still raised. Warm daylight everywhere except inside the dark well opening. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Top-down shot looking over Toon Link's shoulder into the well. His hands grip the mossy stone rim. Below: absolute blackness. The well is very deep — light only reaches a few feet down before the wet stone walls vanish into nothing. Link's face lit from above, eyes wide, peering down. A single water drop catches the light as it falls into the dark. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Same over-the-shoulder angle at the well, but Toon Link has jerked back from the rim, startled. His eyes are huge. From the dark hole, faint wavy lines suggest sound rising — a voice echoing up from below. The darkness seems deeper now, more alive. Link's hands still grip the stone but his body leans away. Bright daylight above, impenetrable dark below. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link leans over the well rim, cupping his hands around his mouth, shouting down into the dark opening. His face is determined and concerned. The dark well opening dominates the lower half of the image. Faint echo lines rise from the blackness. His whole posture reaches toward the voice below. Bright sunny island behind him. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link at the well rim, feeding a coil of brown rope down into the darkness hand over hand. The rope disappears into the black opening. His face is focused and hopeful. A simple dock rope, the kind found on a tropical island. He braces one foot against the well's base. Bright daylight, green grass around the well. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link pulls the rope back up over the well, the dangling end clearly too short — it hangs in midair pathetically. His face falls with disappointment. Simple visual comedy: the short rope versus the very deep dark hole. Bright sunny day, green grass. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link kneeling on the grass next to the well, tongue sticking out with concentration, tying a thick leafy green vine to the end of the brown rope with a big knot. The combined rope-and-vine is coiled beside him, longer now. The vine is curly and leafy, clearly pulled from a nearby tree. Second attempt. Bright daylight. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Same framing as the too-short rope scene — Toon Link pulling the rope-vine combo back up over the well, the end dangling uselessly. Still not long enough. Faint wavy echo lines rise from the dark well opening — the voice calling again. Link's face shifts from frustration to something softer, more determined. Bright day. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link at the well, one hand cupped to his mouth shouting down, the other hand unbuckling his brown leather belt. His green tunic already hangs loose without it. The rope-vine-belt chain lies coiled on the grass, getting longer and more absurd. His face is pure determination. Comedy beat — he's taking himself apart to make the rope longer. Bright daylight. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link running toward the well, arms full of a long white clothesline with clothespins still clipped to it and a sock dangling from one end. Behind him in the distance, a bare clothesline post — laundry dumped on the ground. He looks slightly guilty but mostly determined. Next to the well: the ridiculous pile of rope, vine, belt, now plus clothesline. Comedy escalation. Bright daylight. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. The absurd patchwork rope hangs from the well rim into the darkness — brown rope, green vine, leather belt, white clothesline with a dangling sock — and the end STILL dangles in the void, not reaching the bottom. Toon Link slumps against the well rim, arms hanging over the edge, defeated. The Frankenstein rope is the visual punchline. Bright sunny day. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Dark atmospheric scene. Tight close-up of the dark well opening from above. The blackness is absolute — a perfect dark circle filling most of the frame. The faintest, thinnest wavy lines suggest a voice rising, but quieter and weaker than before. Mossy stone rim edges the darkness. No characters visible — just the dark hole and the dying echo. The mood has shifted entirely. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring. Toon Link standing at the well rim, the patchwork rope gripped in both hands. He stares down into the darkness. His face is scared but resolved — jaw set, knuckles white on the rope. He is not lowering it this time. He is going to climb down himself. The moment before the leap. Bright daylight behind him, dark void below. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Dark atmospheric scene with minimal light. Shot from inside the well looking up. Toon Link's small silhouette against the bright circle of sky above, gripping the patchwork rope, feet braced against the wet mossy stone wall. He descends into darkness. The circle of sky above is his last connection to the safe world. Below: nothing visible, just darkness. Water drips on the close, claustrophobic walls. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Dark atmospheric scene with minimal light. Close-up of Toon Link on the well wall in near-darkness. Only faint light from the tiny sky circle far above. His hands grip the end of the patchwork rope — a sock on the clothesline is the last thing he holds. Below the rope's end, his foot stretches down to find a narrow stone ledge. His face barely visible — eyes wide, mouth tight, feeling his way blind. Wet stone, cold, tactile. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Dark atmospheric scene with minimal light. Near-total darkness — almost a black image. Toon Link barely visible as a faint outline against wet stone. Below him and slightly to one side: two small eyes glowing faintly green-gold in the blackness. Just the eyes — nothing else of the creature is visible. Small, round, looking up at him. Not menacing, just present. A tiny light in total darkness. Almost a black page with two small luminous green-gold dots. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Dark atmospheric scene with soft green-gold glow. Toon Link kneels in shallow water at the bottom of the well. In his cupped hands: a tiny Korok — round wooden body, leaf-face mask with glowing green-gold eye holes, a single large drooping wet leaf on top. The Korok fits in his two hands. The Korok's faint bioluminescence lights both their faces in warm green-gold against the surrounding blackness. Link's expression is pure wonder — wide eyes, open mouth. Magical and intimate. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Dark scene with green-gold glow and growing light from above. Toon Link climbing back up the well wall, gripping ledges and the patchwork rope. On his shoulders sits a tiny Korok, clinging to Link's cap with stubby wooden hands. The Korok's leaf-face glows faintly, casting a small circle of green-gold light on the wet stones around them. The circle of sky above is getting closer and brighter. Link's face shows effort and determination. The Korok peeks over Link's head toward the light. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors — almost overexposed after the dark well scenes. Toon Link pulling himself over the well rim into brilliant flooding sunlight. Both he and the tiny Korok on his shoulder squint and blink against the brightness. Vivid green grass, bright blue sky, sparkling ocean. Everything overwhelmingly vivid and warm. The Korok shades his glowing eyes with one tiny hand. Maximum color contrast with preceding dark pages. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. A tiny Korok lifts off Toon Link's shoulder — his big leaf spinning like a helicopter blade, his whole tiny wooden body rising into the air. He shakes off water droplets that catch the sunlight like tiny diamonds. He is flying! Link stands below, arms half-raised, mouth hanging wide open in pure comic disbelief. The Korok looks delighted, doing a little loop in the air. Bright sunny tropical island background. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.

Cel-shaded illustration in the style of The Legend of Zelda: The Wind Waker. Bold black outlines, textured cel-shaded coloring, bright saturated colors. Toon Link stands alone by the well in sunshine, looking up at the empty sky. On top of his blonde hair just in front of his green cap: a single small acorn-like seed. His expression is bemused — one eyebrow raised, a half-smile forming. The well sits quietly behind him, just an old stone well. The island is bright and peaceful — green grass, blue ocean, palm trees. One seed. One boy. Final image. Square 1:1 composition. No text in image.
